case_title: NIKOLA HENDRICKSON VS. MING JING LI

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-21-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-21-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY MANDARIN INTERPRETER---JESSE YU. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HENDRICKSON, NIKOLA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LI, MING JING AKA KIMBERLY LI;AKA MING JING LI;AKA YUMI LI STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
